problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: If Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
